## Definition of Done:

- [ ] Code Complete: All development work is finished.
- [ ] Code Review: The code has been peer-reviewed and merged into the main branch.
- [ ] Tested: The feature passes all unit tests, automated functional tests, and regression tests.
- [ ] Accessibility/Design: The UI matches the approved wireframes and meets accessibility standards.
- [ ] Documented: End-user documentation and internal API/code documentation are updated.
- [ ] Deployed: The feature is deployed to the staging environment and ready for stakeholder review.
